## What's Changed

- Added server-side The Tube TV Mode lineup and channel configuration.
- Added continuous Tube TV channel stream endpoints that transcode Local media and local commercials into one live-style stream.
- Added custom Tube TV channel settings, commercial category selection, and auto-channel controls to the server UI.
- Improved Local media browse/discovery metadata for Movies, Series, genres, decades, and Continue Watching style playback state.
- Added server tests covering Tube TV lineups, Local discovery, playback state, and active/completed playback history.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

Keep your existing `/config`, media folder, cache, and hardware device mappings.
